response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified the primary vocal song as 'SNAKE EYES' by Hakos Baelz.
2. Verified the song title and credits through on-screen text at 03:41.
3. Used a web search to retrieve the full lyrics for 'SNAKE EYES' by Hakos Baelz, including both the original mixed-language lyrics and an English translation.
4. Mapped the scenes based on the continuous performance of the song, with a brief interlude for the credit card.
5. Constructed the final JSON response with the identified metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a high-energy 3D dance and vocal performance by Hakos Baelz of her original song 'SNAKE EYES', with a short credit interlude in the middle.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz performs a 3D dance and vocal performance to her song 'SNAKE EYES'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 준비～! That's Good Game, What a shame. Players, they all complain \"Why me?\" \"No not again!\" Shout! Ratatata～ But! Ain't got time so dry those eyes Look around what's that I spy The Broken and Bruised All got something to prove now Abracadabra let's go Watch them like dice as they fall(they fall) 끝까지 가보자 Go 나는 내 맘 대로해, Hey Double one, Double win Lowly to Lottery Do or Die We hit that high (Snake eyes, snake eyes) Come on now don't be shy (Snake eyes, snake eyes) 뜨겁게 달아올라 (불타올라) 놀자 all day all night (all day all night) So turn it up can't stop won't stop preachin Who said the sky's the limit? Show them that we mean business We are the young and vicious Snake eyes they never lie Fly high with pride and leave your fears behind 지겨워! 우리 들의 광란의 Party 보여줄게 환상 Safari baddie baddie, nobody can stop me 끼리끼리 붙어, Come on closer! Go!Go! 더 빨리 (Check It Out) Actin all Naughty 싹다 부셔 모조리 모조리 싹다다다다! Shake it off, what goes around Shut your mouth, will come back down Ready the fight, Ready the screaming Abracadabra let's go Watch it we reapin it all (reapin it all) 꺽이지 않는 의지 될대로 돼볼래 Play Reason, Our demon Believe in the beaten Just wait and see We hit that high (Snake eyes, snake eyes) Come on now don't be shy (Snake eyes, snake eyes) 뜨겁게 달아올라 (불타올라) 놀자 all day all night (All day all night) Let the beat drop! Go! We Go hard (Go hard) 기사회생 전부를 걸어Bet Go! We Go hard I want it all 다시 일어나 파괴와 재생 죽지않아, 전부걸어 맞서 싸워, 시작이야 Take the crown 끝까지 달려가 Rule the game (We'll hit that high) We hit that eye (Snake eyes, snake eyes) Come on, don't be shy (Eye; Snake eyes, snake eyes) 같이 춤을 춰봐, 이렇게 멈출순 없어 같이 Dance all night (준비～!) Don't be afraid of losing It's just a new beginning Look at the cards we dealing Sometimes it takes a villain Snake eyes the time is nigh Fly high with pride and leave your fears behind!,song_title:
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Ready! That's good game, what a shame. Players they all complain \"Why me?\" \"No, not again!\" Shout ra-ta-ta, but! Ain't got time, so dry those eyes. Look around, what's that I spy? The broken and bruised, I'll got something to prove now. Abracadabra, let's go! Watch them like dust as they fall (They fall). Let's go to the end, go! I'll do as I like (Hey). Double one, double win. Lowly to lottery, do or die. We hit that high (Snake eyes, snake eyes). Come on, don't be shy (Snake eyes, snake eyes). Heat up, follow along (Burn up). Let's play all day, all night (All day, all night). So turn it up, can't stop, won't stop preachin. Who said the sky's a limit? Show them that we mean business. We are the young and vicious. Snake eyes, they never lie. Fly high with pride and leave your fears behind. I'm sick of it. Our crazy party. I'll show you a fantasy safari. Baddie, baddie, nobody can stop me. Gather together, come on closer! Go, go, faster (Check it out). Actin' all naughty. Break it all, everything. Break it all, da-da-da-da! Shake it off, what goes around. Shut your mouth, will come back down. Ready the fight, ready the screaming. Abracadabra, let's go! Watch it, we reapin' it all (Reapin' it all). Unbreakable will, let it be, let it be. Play. Reason, our demon. Believe in the beaten. Just wait and see. We hit that high (Snake eyes, snake eyes). Come on, don't be shy (Snake eyes, snake eyes). Heat up, follow along (Burn up). Let's play all day, all night (All day, all night). Let the beat drop! Go! We go hard (Go hard). Resuscitation, bet everything (Bet). Go! We go hard, we want it all. Stand up again, destruction and regeneration. Won't die, bet everything. Face it and fight, it's starting. Take the crown. Run to the end, rule the game (We'll hit that high). We hit that eye (Snake eyes, snake eyes). Come on, don't be shy (Eye; Snake eyes, snake eyes). Let's dance together, like this. Can't stop, let's dance all night (Ready!). Don't be afraid of losing. It's just a new beginning. Look at the cards we dealing. Sometimes it takes a villain. Snake eyes, the time is nigh. Fly high with pride and leave your fears behind!

scenes.description: Credit card screen displaying song information. No vocal music playing.
